title: OpenTracer Scope Management

activate_flow.description: Activating a span via an OpenTracer adapter (both OT1 and OT behave identically)
steps: DECISION: Is $span an instance of the adapter Span class?
YES → call $span->unwrapped() to obtain the native DDTrace\Span
NO  → call Span::toDDSpan($span) to convert the foreign OTSpan to a native DDTrace\Span
DECISION: Is $span instanceof DDTrace\Span AND ObjectKVStore key 'ddtrace_scope_activated' present?
WRAP: adapter wraps returned DDTrace\Scope in new OpenTracer1\Scope / OpenTracer\Scope
END: return OTScope wrapper to caller

get_active_flow.description: Retrieving the currently active scope via an OpenTracer adapter
steps: IF scope's span is finished → remove from array (sync userland with internal engine)
IF root span exists → build new DDTrace\Scope wrapping the root span, push to $scopes[0]
CALL active_span() (DDTrace C-extension) to discover any internally-activated spans
FOR each internal span not yet in userland scopes → create new DDTrace\Scope, prepend
IF span is not a DDTrace\Span OR ObjectKVStore 'ddtrace_scope_activated' is truthy → return that scope
IF no active scope found → return null
DECISION: Is the returned DDTrace\Scope null?
NO  → wrap in new OpenTracer1\Scope / OpenTracer\Scope
END: return OTScope wrapper (or null) to caller

unwrapped_flow.description: Unwrapping the adapter to access the native DDTrace ScopeManager
steps: END: caller now holds the native DDTrace\ScopeManager directly

key_differences_ot1_vs_ot: OpenTracer1\ScopeManager::activate has strict typed bool param (PHP 7.1+): activate(OTSpan $span, bool $finishSpanOnClose = true): OTScope
OpenTracer\ScopeManager::activate uses untyped param (PHP 5/7 compatible): activate(OTSpan $span, $finishSpanOnClose = true) — no return type hint
OpenTracer1\Scope::close() has : void return type; OpenTracer\Scope::close() has no return type
OpenTracer1\Scope::getSpan() returns OTSpan type hint; OpenTracer\Scope::getSpan() untyped
Both adapters are structurally identical in logic — only PHP type strictness differs
important_notes: Both adapter ScopeManagers are final classes — not extendable
The adapter pattern: OT interface → adapter class → DDTrace\Contracts\ScopeManager (native)
Span unwrapping: if the OTSpan is already an adapter Span, call unwrapped(); otherwise convert via toDDSpan()
DDTrace\ScopeManager reconciles PHP userland scope stack with C-extension internal span stack on every getActive() call
ObjectKVStore tracks 'ddtrace_scope_activated' flag on internal spans for cross-layer sync
root_span() and active_span() are DDTrace C-extension global functions used internally
Scopes stack is LIFO — getActive() walks from top (most recent) downward
hostRootScopes tracks distributed-tracing root spans; close() on ScopeManager closes all host root scopes
